_meta.note: Phase B English for canonical sample codes. Zh source fields remain in segment JSON.

18.essenceEn: You carry the origin frequency of the Transformer — a soul wired for deep metamorphosis, shadow work, and rebirth through awareness rather than suffering.
strengthsEn: You can move through low-frequency states and emerge with clarity.
You naturally guide others to face shadow material with honesty.
You hold an innate ability to reshape life structures when old forms no longer serve.
shadowsEn: You may dive into emotional depths and mistake intensity for truth.
You can believe pain is the only path to growth.
You may place yourself under constant spiritual pressure to evolve.
18.lessonEn: Learn to transform gently — alchemy through awareness, not through forcing yourself through pain.
directionEn: Healing, shadow work, energy transformation, and life coaching paths align with your frequency.
You often function as an accelerator for soul evolution — for yourself and for others you guide.
18.guidanceEn: You are not here to suffer — you are here to raise frequency. When you learn to transform with softness, your power becomes purer than fire. You walk through darkness carrying light.
18.colorEn: Deep violet flame — the color of purification through passion.
18.totemEn: Snake — the path of shedding, renewal, and conscious rebirth.

110.guidanceEn: Channel amplified intensity through breath, boundaries, and creative expression — not through suppression or emotional overwhelm.

27.essenceEn: Relationships carry a strong awakening effect for you.
27.relationshipDynamicEn: Relationships carry a strong awakening effect.
27.healingPathEn: Allow the oscillation to become growth.
27.guidanceEn: You did not meet to stay comfortable — you met to awaken.

5.essenceEn: The belief that emotion equals truth.
5.coreIllusionEn: The belief that emotion equals truth.
5.practiceEn: Practice conscious breathing and separating from reactive emotion.
5.pathOfReturnEn: Practice conscious breathing and separating from reactive emotion.
5.guidanceEn: Emotion is speaking — but you are not the emotion.

7.essenceEn: The sense that you are never enough.
7.coreIllusionEn: The sense that you are never enough.
7.guidanceEn: Your worth is not your result — it is your essence.
